to final form
In Craft, your writing moves with you — capture ideas instantly across all your devices, then refine them when you’re ready. Transform quick iPhone notes into documents you’re proud to share.

Perfect Bread Recipe

Travel
Find Restaurants to Try
Travel
Bourdain’s been on my mind again. Not just the food, the knives, the back-of-the-kitchen grit — but how he moved through the world. Curious. Sharp. Honest. Flawed in a way that made sense. I miss that kind of honesty.
My Sourdough Bread
My Bread
My Sourdough Bread
500g Bread Flour
350g Lukewarm Water
100g Active Sourdough Starter
10g Of Salt
Start in the morning. Grab a big bowl and toss in 500g of bread flour (or all-purpose, don’t overthink it) with 350g of lukewarm water. Stir it into a shaggy mess. You’re not kneading, just mixing. Cover the bowl and walk away for 30–45 minutes. Let the flour and water get to know each other, this is the autolyse, where the magic begins.
Come back. Now, add 100g of your bubbly sourdough starter (you fed it last night, right?) and 10g of salt. Use your hands and mix it all together. It’ll be sticky, borderline annoying, but just keep folding and squishing until it feels more like a dough than a swamp.

changelog.title: What's new
changelog.text:
What's new
What's new
;
What's new
Hi there,
Today we are sharing two big updates - quality-of-life upgrades to
Collections
in the native apps, and a major
under-the-hood rework
on Web and Windows. No new features this time, both releases focus on making Craft better to use every day, and both are just the first step of a broader push to
improve the overall quality
. We'd love to hear which quality improvements you'd like to see next!
Plus: 2 days left on our
Spring Sale
(40% off Plus and Family, for life), and if you're in
San Francisco the week of June 8
, save the date for our
first ever community meetup
.
Spring Sale - 2 days left!
Until
end of Thursday, May 21
, get a
40% recurring discount
on all new
Plus and Family subscriptions
, including upgrades from older Pro and Business plans. Available only on the
web app
.
Use
SPRING26
during checkout for a
40% lifetime discount
❓️FAQ on the Spring Sale
Can I use this discount for existing subscriptions?
Only if you upgrade, for example from the old Pro Tier to Plus.
If you run into any issues during the subscription or upgrade flow, just email us at
support@craft.do
!
Can I use this discount when subscribing via the native apps?
No, you’ll need to log in on the
Web app
to subscribe or upgrade there.
Collections
This update is mainly focusing on collections to iron out usability issues and expand editing capabilities in-line on the smallest devices. We are not introducing anything new rather aiming to improve the overall experience.
Kanban - built for flow
Add items, anywhere, fast
•
New always-visible "+" button at the bottom of every column
•
Hover top of column on macOS for quick add & options (always visible on iOS/iPadOS)
•
Top toolbar "+" adds to the first column in one click
Smarter item interactions
•
Click to select on macOS / iPadOS+mouse → edit title and fields inline, delete, copy/paste
•
Tap on iOS/iPadOS jumps straight to the subpage
•
New button to enter subpages on hover
Right-click / long-press menu
•
New
Edit fields
action: see all properties, edit values, or add a new field — without leaving the board
Groups, finally inline
•
Add a new group with a single click — hover handle on macOS, pseudo-column on touch
•
Edit, hide, or delete groups from the new top 3-dot menu
Gallery - cleaner adding, same shortcuts
•
New always-visible "+" tile to add the next item — smartly resizes to fit even/odd grids
•
macOS: select the collection to reveal the circular blue add button
•
Same click / right-click / multi-select behavior as Kanban — one mental model across views
Table - quick edits, quick adds
•
Subtle blue dots on macOS to add items and
new fields
inline
•
Full-screen and touch: empty row at the bottom for fast entry, plus "+" column on the right for new fields
•
Tap a cell to select, tap again to edit. Tap the title cell → right arrow button to open the subpage
•
Tap the row number column on iOS/iPadOS for instant multi-select
Redesigned View & Collection options
We combined the old "Kanban/Gallery/Table View" and "Change view" menus into a single panel with a tab bar on top — switch layout, tweak visibility, and manage views all in one place.
•
macOS:
click an active view to open the focused list
•
macOS & iPadOS:
tap the slider icon in the top-right toolbar.
•
iOS:
tap the view dropdown to open the full context menu — view options live under
Edit view
, with collection actions right below.
Other improvements on the native apps
•
Significant
performance improvements
for
large tables.
•
Type
@
in a document title to insert links
- same as in text blocks. Mention people, link to other documents, or reference tasks directly from the title.
•
Cmd+Option+T
now
reliably closes all toggles
when you've selected toggles together with their content (for example, after Cmd+A).
•
Tap a custom reminder
to
jump
straight
into editing
•
Renamed the find-and-replace option
"Ignore Diacritics"
to "Diacritics Insensitive"
for consistency with the other, "Case Insensitive" option.
Web & Windows major under the hood rework
We've been working hard to significantly improve Craft on Web and Windows. This release is the first step in a broader push to raise the overall quality of Craft across every platform, expect more to follow.
It brings personalization, performance, and polish: new tabs open faster, memory usage is smarter, a new in-app update banner keeps you current, and we've fixed a long list of keyboard, sync, and editor issues, including a major fix for Dvorak, QWERTZ, and AZERTY layouts.
Highlights
•
Faster, smoother app:
New tabs open noticeably quicker thanks to a pre-warmed view. Idle background tabs are auto-released after 10 minutes to keep memory in check.
•
In-app updates:
A new update banner appears when an update is ready, plus a manual Check for updates button in the About section.
•
Daily-note date navigator:
A new pill control lets you jump between days quickly.
•
Quicker navigation:
"Open in new tab" is now available in folder and shared-with-me menus, and every document card has a handy Copy link action.
•
Cross-tab sync:
Language, theme, and "What's New" dismissal now stay in sync across all your open tabs.
•
Big keyboard fix:
Letter shortcuts and Cmd+. / Cmd+/ now work correctly on Dvorak, QWERTZ, AZERTY, and other non-US keyboard layouts.
•
Personalize your accent color:
Pick any accent color and watch it flow through the editor: links, selection, drag highlights, the daily-note "Today" header, and icon badges all adapt automatically. Dark mode keeps everything readable, even on bright accents.
Editor improvements
•
Pasting into a table cell now lands inside the cell instead of below the table
•
Single-click no longer toggles edit/select on empty table cells
•
Improved formula editing in tables
•
New visible-section indicator in the Table of Contents sidebar
•
Smoother sidebar animations and tighter row spacing
•
Fixed cover image clashing with content in wide page layout
•
Select block on right-click
Collections
•
Fixed SUM aggregation precision and grouped-calculation scope
•
Kanban: fixed infinite render loop in group toggles and card insertion with duplicated column names
•
Faster gallery card opening on fast double-click
•
Better theming in popups and menus
Sync & stability
•
More reliable cross-tab logout and restored Windows context menu
•
Fixed clipping on maximized windows
•
Folder move-to-root sync and root folder ordering fixed
•
Tab state survives disk errors gracefully, no more crashes on low disk space
•
Fewer memory leaks and render loops throughout the editor
Would you join our first ever meetup in San Francisco this summer?
We are planning to have
our first ever community meetup in San Francisco
during the week of June 8th, where you can meet with some of the team members, hear about our plans for the rest of 2026 and meet with other Craft users.
We'll be happy to see you! If you are interested please fill out the
following survey
.

Introduction
Craft Documentation
Learn how to use Craft – the powerful, beautiful tool for creating documents, managing tasks, and organizing your work and life.
Documentation Index
Fetch the complete documentation index at:
https://craft-support.mintlify.app/llms.txt
Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further.
Welcome to Craft! Whether you’re new to the app or looking to master advanced features, this documentation will help you get the most out of your experience.
Craft is more than a note-taking app – it’s a complete workspace for thinking, creating, planning, and collaborating. From AI-powered assistance to powerful organization tools, Craft adapts to how you work.
​
Getting started
New to Craft? Start here to learn the fundamentals and set up your workspace.
Introduction
Get started with Craft and learn the basics of documents, navigation, and essential features
Move to Craft
Migrate your notes from Notion, Obsidian, Evernote, and other platforms
​
Video Tutorials
New to Craft? Watch our Craft 101 intro to get started in just one minute.
Watch the full Craft 101 series →
11 video tutorials covering everything from basics to advanced features
​
Core features
Master the essential capabilities that make Craft powerful.
Write and Edit
Create beautiful documents with formatting, styling, media, and advanced editing tools
Plan and Do
Stay organized with tasks, calendar, daily notes, and reminders all in one place
Organize and Find
Use collections, linking, search, spaces, and tags to keep everything organized
Share and Publish
Collaborate with teams and publish professional content to the web
​
AI and integrations
Enhance your workflow with AI assistance and powerful integrations.
AI Assistant
Use AI to understand, summarize, and work with your content using natural language
Integrate
Connect Craft with calendars, reminders, shortcuts, widgets, and external APIs
Import and Export
Move your content in and out of Craft with support for multiple formats
​
Account and support
Manage your account, subscription, and get help when you need it.
Account and Subscription
Manage your profile, plans, billing, security, and storage settings
Troubleshooting
Find solutions to common issues across all platforms
​

analysis.name: Craft
analysis.tagline: Your space for notes, tasks, and big ideas
analysis.value_proposition: An all-in-one workspace for writing, tasks, calendar, and whiteboards that replaces multiple apps at a fraction of the cost.
analysis.ideal_customer: Individual creators, students, and small teams who want a beautiful, unified workspace for notes, tasks, and docs across Apple and Windows devices

features.name: document editor
features.description: Rich text document creation with formatting, styling, media, and advanced editing tools
features.evidence_quote: Create beautiful documents with formatting, styling, media, and advanced editing tools

features.name: tasks
features.description: Built-in task management system with creation, tracking, and reminders
features.evidence_quote: Creating and Managing Tasks – Master Craft's task management system

features.name: calendar
features.description: Integrated calendar view for planning and scheduling
features.evidence_quote: Docs, Tasks, Calendar, Whiteboards, Daily Notes

features.description: Visual whiteboarding canvas for ideation and visual planning
features.evidence_quote: Docs, Tasks, Calendar, Whiteboards, Daily Notes

features.name: daily notes
features.description: Dedicated daily note-taking with date navigator to jump between days
features.evidence_quote: Daily-note date navigator: A new pill control lets you jump between days quickly.

features.name: templates
features.description: Pre-built document templates for common use cases
features.evidence_quote: Templates

features.description: Metered AI usage via monthly credit allowances; free gets 15, Plus gets 50/month
features.evidence_quote: AI assistant credits: 15 credits [Free] / 50 credits/month [Plus]

features.name: ai model tiers
features.description: Multiple AI model quality tiers (Core, Fast, Max); Max only available on paid plans
features.evidence_quote: AI assistant model: Core, Fast [Free] / Core, Fast, Max [Plus]

features.name: publish and share
features.description: Publish documents publicly to the web with custom domains and analytics
features.evidence_quote: Publishing Documents – Share your work publicly with custom domains and analytics

features.description: Publish Craft documents under a custom domain
features.evidence_quote: Share your work publicly with custom domains and analytics

features.description: Structured databases with custom properties supporting Kanban, Gallery, and Table views
features.evidence_quote: Collections – Build structured databases with custom properties

features.name: kanban view
features.description: Kanban board layout for collections with columns, groups, and inline editing
features.evidence_quote: Kanban - built for flow. Add items, anywhere, fast

features.name: gallery view
features.description: Gallery layout for collections with visual card display
features.evidence_quote: Gallery - cleaner adding, same shortcuts. New always-visible '+' tile to add the next item

features.name: table view
features.description: Spreadsheet-like table layout for collections with inline editing and formula support
features.evidence_quote: Table - quick edits, quick adds. Subtle blue dots on macOS to add items and new fields inline

features.name: formula support in tables
features.description: Formula editing capability within table cells in collections
features.evidence_quote: Improved formula editing in tables

features.name: ai collection understanding
features.description: AI assistant understands collection properties and relationships for queries
features.evidence_quote: Collections improvements – AI understands collection properties and relationships

features.description: Document version history; 7 days on free, 30 days on Plus
features.evidence_quote: Version history: 7 days [Free] / 30 days [Plus]

features.description: Sync documents and data across all devices
features.evidence_quote: Cross-device sync [available on both Free and Plus]

features.evidence_quote: Shared Space: Not available [Free] / Available with Craft Family [Plus]

features.evidence_quote: MCP connections: Claude, ChatGPT, Claude Code, Windsurf, Cursor, Visual Studio Code, Raycast

features.description: REST API access for building integrations; rate limited at 100 req/min on both plans
features.evidence_quote: API & MCP access: 100 requests/min, 20,000 blocks/min

features.description: MCP and API expanded to support full space access, daily notes, tasks, and advanced search
features.evidence_quote: MCP and API expansion – Full space access, daily notes, tasks, and advanced search capabilities

features.description: Tag-based content organization and filtering

features.evidence_quote: Tap a custom reminder to jump straight into editing

features.evidence_quote: Document Styling – Make your documents beautiful with custom styles

features.description: Document cover image support
features.evidence_quote: Fixed cover image clashing with content in wide page layout

features.name: table of contents sidebar
features.description: Visible section indicators in a Table of Contents sidebar panel
features.evidence_quote: New visible-section indicator in the Table of Contents sidebar

features.description: Collapsible toggle blocks for hiding/showing content sections
features.evidence_quote: Cmd+Option+T now reliably closes all toggles when you've selected toggles together with their content

features.name: find and replace

features.evidence_quote: Renamed the find-and-replace option 'Ignore Diacritics' to 'Diacritics Insensitive'

features.name: keyboard shortcuts
features.description: Comprehensive keyboard shortcut system including support for Dvorak, QWERTZ, AZERTY layouts
features.evidence_quote: Letter shortcuts and Cmd+. / Cmd+/ now work correctly on Dvorak, QWERTZ, AZERTY, and other non-US keyboard layouts.

features.name: multi-select
features.description: Multi-select for blocks and collection items
features.evidence_quote: Same click / right-click / multi-select behavior as Kanban — one mental model across views

features.description: Offline editing support on Web, Windows, and Android
features.evidence_quote: Cross-platform updates – Space-level Assistant and offline editing on Web, Windows, and Android

features.name: accent color personalization
features.description: Pick custom accent color that flows through editor UI elements including links and icon badges
features.evidence_quote: Pick any accent color and watch it flow through the editor: links, selection, drag highlights, the daily-note 'Today' header

features.name: cross-tab sync
features.description: Language, theme, and state synced across all open browser tabs
features.evidence_quote: Cross-tab sync: Language, theme, and 'What's New' dismissal now stay in sync across all your open tabs.

features.name: widgets
features.description: Home screen / OS widgets for quick access to Craft content
features.evidence_quote: Connect Craft with calendars, reminders, shortcuts, widgets, and external APIs

features.description: File and media storage; 1 GB on free, unlimited on Plus
features.evidence_quote: Storage: 1 GB [Free] / Unlimited [Plus]

features.name: media upload
features.description: Upload images and media; 25 MB per file on free, unlimited on Plus
features.evidence_quote: Media upload limit: 25 MB [Free] / Unlimited [Plus]

features.name: education plan
features.description: Special pricing plan for educational users
features.evidence_quote: Education Plan [listed in footer navigation]

features.name: content blocks
features.description: Block-based content model; free plan capped at 1500 blocks total
features.evidence_quote: Content limit: 1500 blocks [Free] / Unlimited [Plus]

features.name: slash menu
features.description: Slash command menu for quickly inserting content types
features.evidence_quote: Slash Menu [listed as core navigation feature in docs]

features.name: space-level ai assistant
features.description: AI assistant scoped to an entire Space for cross-document queries
features.evidence_quote: Cross-platform updates – Space-level Assistant and offline editing on Web, Windows, and Android

features.name: multi-platform apps
features.description: Native apps for iPhone, iPad, Mac, Windows, Android, and Apple Vision Pro
features.evidence_quote: Craft for iPhone, iPad, Mac, Windows, Vision Pro, Android

differentiators: All-in-one workspace (notes, tasks, calendar, whiteboards) replacing multiple apps at $8/month vs $46/month for equivalents
Fixed-price family and team plans (not per-seat scaling) — Family is flat $15 for up to 6, Team flat $50 for up to 10
Native MCP server connections to AI coding tools (Claude, Cursor, Windsurf, VS Code, Raycast)
Apple Design Awards finalist and Mac App of the Year winner — design-first positioning
Block-based content model enabling structured databases (Collections) alongside freeform docs in one surface
Offline editing on Web, Windows, and Android

recent_ships.what: Collections overhaul: Kanban always-visible add buttons, inline group editing, unified view/options panel; Gallery smart resizing; Table inline field add and touch multi-select
recent_ships.source: Collections - built for flow: New always-visible '+' button at the bottom of every column

recent_ships.what: Web & Windows major under-the-hood rework: pre-warmed tab loading, idle tab memory release, in-app update banner, daily-note date navigator, accent color personalization, Dvorak/QWERTZ/AZERTY keyboard fix, cross-tab sync
recent_ships.source: We've been working hard to significantly improve Craft on Web and Windows. This release is the first step in a broader push

recent_ships.what: @ mentions in document titles for linking people, documents, and tasks
recent_ships.source: Type @ in a document title to insert links - same as in text blocks.

recent_ships.what: MCP and API expansion: full space access, daily notes, tasks, and advanced search via API/MCP
recent_ships.source: MCP and API expansion – Full space access, daily notes, tasks, and advanced search capabilities

recent_ships.what: AI Assistant: Image and PDF OCR, custom prompts with search, Help Agent integration
recent_ships.source: AI Assistant enhancements – Image and PDF OCR, custom prompts with search, Help Agent integration

recent_ships.what: Offline editing on Web, Windows, and Android
recent_ships.source: Cross-platform updates – Space-level Assistant and offline editing on Web, Windows, and Android

praised: Publishing directly from Craft just feels natural — it's where I write, so it makes sense to share from there too. (Tom, podcaster)

free_tier.limits: 1500 blocks total, 1 GB storage, 25 MB media upload, 7-day version history, 15 AI credits, no shared space

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.headline_inclusions: All features with 1500-block content limit, 1 GB storage, 15 AI credits, Core+Fast AI models

tiers.name: Plus
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited blocks/storage/media, 30-day history, 50 AI credits/mo, Core+Fast+Max models, shared space

tiers.name: Family
tiers.headline_inclusions: 2–6 Plus accounts in one flat subscription with shared Space

tiers.name: Team
tiers.headline_inclusions: Up to 10 Plus accounts in one flat subscription with shared Space

pricing.notes: Prices shown are yearly billing rates; monthly billing available at higher rates (exact monthly prices not captured in source). Spring 2026 sale offered 40% lifetime discount (code SPRING26) on Plus and Family for new subscriptions via web app only. Groups larger than 10 contact sales. Education plan exists but pricing not captured. Regional pricing variations noted in FAQ.
